Operations Manager - Logistics Job at Swift Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Swift Consulting Limited - Our client is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager - Logistics

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are currently seeking qualified and experienced applicants to fill the role of Operations Manager - Logistics for one of our clients.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Coordinate with clients, vendors, and internal teams to ensure timely order fulfillment and issue resolution.
	Supervise fleet utilization, maintenance planning, and driver performance to ensure operational efficiency and safety compliance.
	Plan, manage, and monitor end-to-end logistics operations including transportation, distribution, and delivery schedules.
	Implement process improvements to reduce costs, increase productivity, and enhance service quality.
	Monitor operational KPIs, prepare performance reports, and provide strategic recommendations to management.
	Ensure compliance with regulatory, safety, and company policies across all operations.
	Lead, train, and motivate operations staff to achieve departmental goals.
	Manage budgets, resource allocation, and operational risk within the logistics unit.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or a related field.
	4–6 years of experience in Logistics or Operations management (managerial experience preferred).
	Strong leadership, problem-solving, and decision-making skills.
	Excellent organizational and communication abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and logistics/transport management systems.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced, target-driven environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email

Revenue Manager Job at Hyatt Regency




        
    

        
        Expected to open 2025, Hyatt Regency Lagos Ikeja is ideally located in the serene GRA and just moments away from Murtala Muhammed International Airport. Hyatt Regency Lagos Ikeja is a premier hotel in Lagos, Nigeria, offering the perfect blend of convenience and elegance where our guests feel comfortable, connected, and encouraged to be their best selves because they are welcome and relaxed in our care.

Hyatt Regency hotels and resorts are founded on openness - our colleagues consistently serve with open minds and open hearts to deliver unforgettable celebrations, effortless relaxation and notable culinary experiences alongside expert meetings and technology-enabled collaboration.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Revenue Manager
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos

About the role


	The Revenue Manager will play a crucial role in optimizing the hotel’s revenue strategy and maximizing profitability.
	This position requires a strategic thinker with a strong analytical background, capable of leveraging data to drive decision-making processes.
	The ideal candidate will work closely with various departments, including Sales, Marketing, and Operations, to ensure alignment with revenue goals.


Key Responsibilities


	Revenue Strategy Development: Develop and implement effective pricing strategies and yield management techniques to maximize revenue across all distribution channels.
	Market Analysis: Conduct comprehensive market research and competitor analysis to identify trends and opportunities for revenue growth.
	Forecasting: Prepare accurate forecasts for occupancy, average daily rate (ADR), and revenue per available room (RevPAR) to guide financial planning.
	Reporting: Generate regular reports on revenue performance, analyzing key metrics and presenting findings to senior management.
	Collaboration: Work closely with the Sales and Marketing teams to create promotional strategies that drive occupancy and enhance the hotel’s market presence.
	Inventory Management: Optimize room inventory distribution across all channels, including direct bookings, OTAs, and GDS platforms.
	Training & Development: Mentor and train staff on revenue management best practices and tools.


Qualifications  


	Previous experience as a Revenue Manager or similar position.
	Pre-Opening experience is an advantage.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in revenue management within the hotel industry.
	Strong analytical skills with proficiency in revenue management software and Microsoft Excel.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Proven ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.
	Knowledge of current market trends and competitive landscape.and social media.
	Preference will be given to local candidates.


 Care Connects us at Hyatt - we open doors, we welcome you and we care
 And we offer a great range of benefits, including:


	Long term career growth opportunities
	A motivated and connected team
	12 complimentary nights (per year) in other Hyatt properties around the world as well as colleague rates and discounts
	And a company that truly cares
	Discover what’s next. We look forward to hearing and learning from you.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "IP Core Network Engineer",
  "description": "Swift Networks Limited is a facilities-based telecommunications services provider. The company was founded in 2002, since inception, Swift Networks has invested heavily in &ldquo;next generation&rdquo; networking technologies to build a multi-service network platform. Due to rapid expansion, we are looking for a qualified candidate to fill a creative technical position as we hope to maintain our status as the leading broadband connectivity services provider in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IP Core Network Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;(On-Site)
Department:&nbsp;Network Operations Center (NOC)
Reports to:&nbsp;NOC Manager

Job Summary


	We are seeking a skilled IP Core Network Engineer to join our NOC team at a leading ISP.
	In this role, you will monitor, maintain, and optimize our IP core network infrastructure to ensure 99.99% uptime, seamless customer connectivity, and rapid issue resolution.
	You&#39;ll troubleshoot complex network incidents, perform proactive maintenance, and collaborate with engineering teams to scale our backbone for growing broadband demand.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor the IP core network (routers, switches, MPLS, BGP, OSPF, etc.) using NOC tools and proactively identify and resolve performance or availability issues.
	Perform daily network operations tasks, configuration changes, and maintenance activities on core IP nodes in line with defined procedures and KPIs.
	Troubleshoot complex IP and routing issues (BGP, OSPF, MPLS, L2/L3 VPNs, QoS, etc.), analyze logs/traces, and coordinate with vendors or field teams for restoration and root cause analysis.
	Support the management and maintenance of Internet Gateway (IGW) and core transit networks, including traffic engineering and route policy optimization.
	Execute planned activities such as hardware acceptance tests, software upgrades, configuration audits, and network optimization to enhance service quality and performance
	Act as the primary technical escalation point for IP and core network incidents, coordinating with Customer Support, Field Operations, Transmission, and external carriers/vendors until resolution.
	Analyze network traffic patterns with tools like Wireshark or NetFlow to identify anomalies, bottlenecks, and security threats.
	Collaborate with field teams for hardware escalations and with design engineers for capacity planning and new peering implementations.
	Generate daily/weekly reports on network health, SLAs, and incident metrics; escalate Tier 3 issues to senior engineers.
	Ensure compliance with ISP regulations, peering agreements, and best practices for redundancy (e.g., SR/TE, FRR).
	Participate in 24/7 on-call rotations for incident response, aiming for &lt;15-minute MTTR.


Qualifications and Skills


	MUST possess HND - Upper Credit or (Second Class Upper Division) or a Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electrical / Electronics Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
	3 - 5 years of experience in IP core network operations, preferably within an ISP or telecom operator NOC environment.
	Strong hands-on experience with IP routing protocols: BGP, OSPF, ISIS, MPLS, L2VPN, L3VPN, and QoS/traffic engineering.
	Practical experience configuring and operating Cisco or equivalent IP routers and switches; familiarity with vendor-specific tools and CLI.
	Solid understanding of TCP/IP, subnetting, ACLs, NAT, and core IP network design principles.
	Experience with NOC monitoring tools(e.g., SolarWinds, PRTG, or similar) and ticketing/incident management systems.
	Ability to work under pressure, manage multiple priorities, and communicate technical issues clearly to peers and stakeholders.
	Willingness to work in a 24x7 shift-based NOC environment, including nights and weekends


Preferred (Plus Points):


	Knowledge of transport technologies such as DWDM or microwave backhaul.
	Exposure to firewalls, IDS/IPS, and security best practices for core IP networks.
	Professional certifications such as CCNP/CCIE, JNCIP/JNCIE, or equivalent are highly desirable.
	Experience with SDN/NFV (e.g., OpenDaylight, Contrail).
	Knowledge of IPv6 migration, DDoS mitigation, and ISP peering (e.g., IXP like NIXI or local Lagos IX).
	Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
	Strong attention to detail and problem-solving abilities.
	Ability to work under pressure and prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment.


Desirable Skills/Knowledge/Traits:


	Experience with Software-Defined Networking (SDN) technologies.
	Familiarity with network automation and scripting languages (Python, Ansible, etc.).
	Understanding of cloud networking principles and architectures (AWS, Azure, GCP).
	Knowledge of IPv6 deployment and migration strategies.
	Experience with network monitoring and management tools (Nagios, SolarWinds, PRTG, etc.).
	Certifications such as CCNP, CCIE, JNCIP, or equivalent.


Salary
N250,000 - N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CVs to:&nbsp;hr@swiftng.net&nbsp;and use the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

About the Role


	We are an integrated marketing communications company seeking a highly creative and strategic Senior Digital Content &amp; Creative to join our Digital and Entertainment Website team.
	This role is ideal for a content leader who understands storytelling, digital culture, and audience engagement within the entertainment and media landscape.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for shaping content direction, driving creativity across digital platforms, and ensuring content aligns with brand objectives, audience preferences, and performance goals.


Key Responsibilities


	Participate actively in content ideation, planning, and execution for the online entertainment website and digital platforms.
	Develop and manage content strategies across web, social media, video, and emerging digital channels.
	Create high-quality written, visual, and multimedia content in collaboration with designers, videographers, and editors.
	Ensure content is optimised for SEO, engagement, and platform-specific performance.
	Work closely with strategy and other teams to deliver integrated marketing campaigns.
	Monitor content performance using analytics and insights to refine creative direction.
	Stay up to date with entertainment trends, pop culture, and digital conversations within Nigeria and beyond.
	Provide creative guidance, quality control, and mentorship to content and creative team members.

	Minimum of 4 years&rsquo; experience in digital content creation and creative leadership, preferably in media and marketing agencies.
	Strong understanding of the digital content ecosystem, including social platforms, influencers, and entertainment audiences.
	Proven ability to create and manage engaging editorial, branded, and social content.
	Experience with SEO, content management systems, and basic digital analytics.
	Excellent storytelling, copywriting, and creative direction skills.
	Ability to manage multiple projects and work in a fast-paced environment.

	Competitive salary and benefits.

	Career growth opportunities within an integrated marketing organisation.

Senior Digital Content & Creative Job at Strategic Outcomes Limited




        
    

        
        Strategic Outcomes Limited - We are a marketing communication solutions provider. We adopt customer-centric and integrated methods to solve clients’ brand-building challenges. We also provide for our clients’ alternative media/communications opportunities beyond customary and predictable above the-line-advertising.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Digital Content & Creative

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are an integrated marketing communications company seeking a highly creative and strategic Senior Digital Content & Creative to join our Digital and Entertainment Website team.
	This role is ideal for a content leader who understands storytelling, digital culture, and audience engagement within the entertainment and media landscape.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for shaping content direction, driving creativity across digital platforms, and ensuring content aligns with brand objectives, audience preferences, and performance goals.


Key Responsibilities


	Participate actively in content ideation, planning, and execution for the online entertainment website and digital platforms.
	Develop and manage content strategies across web, social media, video, and emerging digital channels.
	Create high-quality written, visual, and multimedia content in collaboration with designers, videographers, and editors.
	Ensure content is optimised for SEO, engagement, and platform-specific performance.
	Work closely with strategy and other teams to deliver integrated marketing campaigns.
	Monitor content performance using analytics and insights to refine creative direction.
	Stay up to date with entertainment trends, pop culture, and digital conversations within Nigeria and beyond.
	Provide creative guidance, quality control, and mentorship to content and creative team members.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree / HND in Mass Communication, Marketing, Media Studies, Creative Arts, or a related field
	Minimum of 4 years’ experience in digital content creation and creative leadership, preferably in media and marketing agencies.
	Strong understanding of the digital content ecosystem, including social platforms, influencers, and entertainment audiences.
	Proven ability to create and manage engaging editorial, branded, and social content.
	Experience with SEO, content management systems, and basic digital analytics.
	Excellent storytelling, copywriting, and creative direction skills.
	Ability to manage multiple projects and work in a fast-paced environment.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits.
	A collaborative and creative work environment.
	Career growth opportunities within an integrated marketing organisation.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio (links to published work or social pages) to: [email protected] using "Senior Digital Content & Creative Application" as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
